issues.title: Do you have a support plan to support qwen2  function call  spring-ai-ollama-spring-boot-starter   ? How long will it take?
issues.body:
**Expected Behavior**
  can  support   spring-ai-ollama-spring-boot-starter   use  qwen2   model  function call

**Current Behavior**

 can't support   

**Context**

 i plan to use   spring-ai-ollama-spring-boot-starter   use  qwen2   function call

comments.body: The Spring AI Ollama integration supports function calling for every model in the Ollama library marked with _Tools_ support. You can find the full list [here](https://ollama.com/search?c=tools). Since the [qwen2](https://ollama.com/library/qwen2) model in Ollama doesn't support tools (you can see the missing "Tools" tag), Spring AI will not either. I would suggest raising a feature request to the Ollama project to make the qwen2 model have tools support.

Hello @CodingNowPls , please follow up and let us know if the Ollama team will support tools so Spring AI function calling will work with qwen2. We'd like to know if this enhancement is implemented. Thank you.

> The Spring AI Ollama integration supports function calling for every model in the Ollama library marked with _Tools_ support. You can find the full list [here](https://ollama.com/search?c=tools). Since the [qwen2](https://ollama.com/library/qwen2) model in Ollama doesn't support tools (you can see the missing "Tools" tag), Spring AI will not either. I would suggest raising a feature request to the Ollama project to make the qwen2 model have tools support.

Thank you, I will continue to follow up on whether ollama supports qwen2 function call

> Hello @CodingNowPls , please follow up and let us know if the Ollama team will support tools so Spring AI function calling will work with qwen2. We'd like to know if this enhancement is implemented. Thank you.

ok, thank you
